CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,131.36 FILED BY PRESIDIO GOLF CLUB, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SPAHN, D. BRYANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
